calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Aug-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Prior to Open Court Counselors appear in an abundance of caution. The Court did not receive any notice to contest. The Court's TR will be the final ruling of the Court.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion for summary judgment is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
